nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient for nuanced tone and perspective
nodes.grounding_span: like sounding something out with an intelligent friend or colleague

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI is perfect for those types of otherwise laborious tasks

nodes.label: AI for role-playing and preparation
nodes.grounding_span: really key to provide the model with a strong context and role

nodes.label: AI as starting point for human adaptation
nodes.label_negative: AI as rigid script to follow verbatim
nodes.grounding_span: I'd much rather use it as a starting point and to generate ideas for me

nodes.label: AI grasp of tone and perspective
nodes.grounding_span: occasionally the models really don't grasp the tone or perspective you're aiming for

nodes.label: Effective communication and relationship building
nodes.grounding_span: being appropriately emotionally intelligent and leveraging psychological tools where possible to try to build trust

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: complex documents which would take hours to put together from scratch

nodes.label: Audience engagement and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: creativity to generate ideas that might draw an audience

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: using my own tone and style of speaking

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: There's no risk or hinderance in using AI for all manner of tasks, so why wouldn't you?

nodes.label: Frustration with AI when it deviates from tone
nodes.grounding_span: occasionally the models really don't grasp the tone or perspective you're aiming for

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I aim to continue using AI tools in my work, and learning more and more as it becomes more powerful

nodes.label: Context-first preparation — invests upfront in role-setting
nodes.grounding_span: I'll spend a couple of minutes putting together a good context paragraph, potentially asking the model to assume a role

nodes.label: Iterative context refinement — provides initial context then adds more to refine
nodes.grounding_span: bounce back and forth from that point onwards
